description: [rm] - Remove files or directories. Sourced directly from Linux Journey curriculum foundations.

commands.explanation: Executes the rm routine logically to process: remove a specific file
Executes the rm routine logically to process: prompt for confirmation before removal

commands.description: Recursively remove a directory and its contents
commands.explanation: Executes the rm routine logically to process: recursively remove a directory and its contents

commands.description: Forcefully and recursively remove a directory without prompting
commands.explanation: Executes the rm routine logically to process: forcefully and recursively remove a directory without prompting
Executes the rm routine logically to process: remove an empty directory
